mapper.sql: id, item_id, custormer_id, level_id, nurse_number, is_deleted, buy_time, maturity_time
mapper.select: SELECT cni.id, cni.item_id, cni.custormer_id, cni.level_id, cni.nurse_number, cni.is_deleted, cni.buy_time, cni.maturity_time, c.customer_name, nc.serial_number, nc.nursing_name, nc.service_price FROM customernurseitem cni JOIN customer c ON(cni.custormer_id=c.id) JOIN nursecontent nc ON (cni.item_id=nc.id) WHERE cni.is_deleted =0 AND cni.custormer_id=#{custormerId}
